videos.title: We Might Have a Vivi Problem
videos.description:
Standard just had rotation and a bunch of bannings, but it also might have a Vivi problem...

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingodm.com/mtggoldfish

#MTG #MagicTheGathering
